text.title: Trunk-Based Challenges & Diagnostics Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing the report artefact assembled from inputs to validated output.

example.title: Diagnostic for a Python+Django team with 2 trunk breaks/week
example.recommended_fix: Cap PR size at 200 lines via repo policy + reviewer training. Track p95 weekly. Re-measure trunk-break frequency after 4 weeks.
example.followups: If breaks persist after 4 weeks, move to check (5) review SLA.
